message:
fix(mux): implement WSLENV passthrough for explicit command env vars

Resolve the long-standing TODO to propagate explicit command environment
variables through WSLENV so they survive the wsl.exe --exec boundary.

Extract three new private methods on LocalDomain:
- wslenv_entry_name(): parse the name portion of WSLENV entries
  (before any /flags suffix)
- augment_wslenv_for_wsl_command(): iterate explicit env keys on the
  CommandBuilder and merge any missing ones into the WSLENV variable
- rewrite_command_for_wsl(): extracted from inline fixup_command body,
  now calls augment_wslenv before swapping argv

Adds two unit tests verifying explicit keys are added to WSLENV and
that existing flagged entries (e.g. SSH_AUTH_SOCK/p) are preserved
without duplication. Also includes minor rustfmt import re-ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
